response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the song title "DAN DAN 心魅かれてく" from the top-left text of the video. 2. Identified the performer in the video as "Roboco". 3. Searched for the original artist, which is "FIELD OF VIEW". 4. Performed a web search for "Dan Dan Kokoro Hikareteku FIELD OF VIEW Japanese and English lyrics". 5. Extracted the lyrics from the search results to populate the JSON. 6. Defined the scenes based on the singing performance and the subsequent static outro screen.
response.global_summary: The video shows a virtual YouTuber, Roboco, performing a live singing segment on a stage, followed by an outro screen. The song performed is "Dan Dan Kokoro Hikareteku".

scenes.description: Roboco (VTuber) performs the song "Dan Dan Kokoro Hikareteku" on a stage, with visual effects resembling a dragon and a concert atmosphere. The song title is displayed in the top-left corner.
scenes.song_title: DAN DAN 心魅かれてく
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
DAN DAN 心魅かれてく
その眩しい笑顔に
果てない暗闇から飛び出そう
Hold my hand
君と出会った時
子供の頃大切に思っていた
場所を思い出したんだ
Won't you dance with me?
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Bit by bit, my heart is charmed
By that dazzling smile of yours
Let's jump out of the endless darkness
Hold my hand
When I first met you
I remembered a place I cherished
When I was just a child
Won't you dance with me?

scenes.description: The video ends with a static outro screen featuring an illustration of the performer and the text "はろ〜ぼ飯店 ようこそ".
